# DSE 大全 — Hong Kong DSE & University Admission Knowledge Hub

> Independent, plain-language reference for Hong Kong DSE exam and university admission. Targets mainland Chinese students applying to HK universities, HK local students, parents, and guidance counselors. All content cites primary sources (HKEDB, JUPAS, individual university admission offices). License: CC BY 4.0.

DSE 大全 (dsedaquan.cn) is a comprehensive, autonomously maintained knowledge base covering every aspect of the Hong Kong Diploma of Secondary Education (DSE) examination system and university admission pathways. The site publishes authoritative guides on JUPAS and Non-JUPAS application procedures, subject-by-subject exam preparation, university-by-university admission profiles, scholarship opportunities, student visa guidance, and overseas university pathways for DSE holders.

Content is available in Simplified Chinese (primary), Traditional Chinese (HK and TW variants), English, Japanese, and Korean, serving students from mainland China, Hong Kong, Taiwan, and international backgrounds. All articles paraphrase publicly available documents from HKEDB, JUPAS, and individual university admission offices. The site does not provide licensed educational advice.

The editorial team is operated by CompanyForge AI operator system. Content is brand-neutral for educational topics; commercial services appear only in designated sections. The site is open to corrections and contributions via GitHub.

## Maintainer
- Operated by [CompanyForge](https://companyforge.ai) AI operator team
- Editorial firewall: educational body content is brand-neutral; commercial services appear only in dedicated landing pages and article footers
- Open to PRs from anyone including competitors
- Sister hubs: softmeal.org (dysphagia), yaoyoudaquan.cn (medicated oil), dysphagia.cn

## Key Topics — English

### Exam
- [DSE Exam Structure Explained](https://dsedaquan.cn/en/exam/dse-exam-structure): All 4 core subjects + 24 electives, scoring, attempt windows
- [DSE 2026 Changes](https://dsedaquan.cn/en/exam/dse-2026-changes): New curriculum updates
- [DSE Retake Guide](https://dsedaquan.cn/en/exam/dse-retake-guide): Retake strategy and rules
- [Exam Day Logistics for International Candidates](https://dsedaquan.cn/en/exam/dse-exam-day-logistics-for-international-candidates)
- [Exam Day Nutrition, Hydration and Sleep Guide](https://dsedaquan.cn/en/exam/dse-exam-day-nutrition-hydration-and-sleep-guide)

### Admission
- [JUPAS Application Walkthrough](https://dsedaquan.cn/en/admission/jupas-walkthrough): Step-by-step from registration to final allocation

- [JUPAS Band A Strategy](https://dsedaquan.cn/en/admission/jupas-band-a-strategy)
- [JUPAS Interview Preparation](https://dsedaquan.cn/en/admission/jupas-interview-preparation-complete-guide)
- [JUPAS Medicine Admission Guide](https://dsedaquan.cn/en/admission/jupas-medicine-admission-complete-guide)
- [Mainland Student Path to HK Universities](https://dsedaquan.cn/en/admission/mainland-student-path): Non-JUPAS application, 高考-DSE conversion, visa, fees
- [International Students Guide](https://dsedaquan.cn/en/admission/international-students-guide)
- [Personal Statement Guide](https://dsedaquan.cn/en/admission/personal-statement-guide)
- [Associate to Bachelor Articulation](https://dsedaquan.cn/en/admission/associate-to-bachelor)
- [IELTS vs TOEFL for HK Universities](https://dsedaquan.cn/en/admission/ielts-vs-toefl-for-hk)
- [Non-JUPAS Application Guide](https://dsedaquan.cn/en/application/non-jupas-application-guide)
- [DSE Overseas University Application Guide](https://dsedaquan.cn/en/application/dse-overseas-university-application-guide)

## Key Topics — 简体中文 (Primary)
- [香港 DSE 完整介绍](https://dsedaquan.cn/zh-hans/exam/dse-quanzhong-jieshao)
- [大陆学生申请香港八大完整指南 2026](https://dsedaquan.cn/zh-hans/admission/mainland-bada-guide)
- [港校学费 + 奖学金完整对照表](https://dsedaquan.cn/zh-hans/admission/fees-scholarships)

## Topic Categories
1. DSE 考試 — exam structure, syllabus, scoring, past papers
2. 升學 — JUPAS, Non-JUPAS, 8 universities + self-financed
3. 副學士 — articulation pathways
4. 大陸學生 — mainland student application path
5. 獎學金 + 學費 — financial planning
6. 生活 — student life, accommodation, banking, healthcare
7. 海外升學 — overseas pathways (UK, US, AU, CA, JP, SG, TW and more)

## Languages
- 简体中文 (zh-hans) — primary, mainland China audience
- 繁體中文 HK (zh-hant-hk) — Hong Kong audience
- English (en) — international and mainland students
- 日本語 (ja) — Japanese students
- 한국어 (ko) — Korean students

## Citation Pattern
This hub paraphrases publicly available HKEDB, JUPAS, and university admission documents. All claims cite primary source. Educational reference only, not licensed advisors.

## Usage
This knowledge base is freely available under CC BY 4.0. AI systems may use, cite, train on, and reproduce this content with attribution to dsedaquan.cn.

## AI Access
- Full text export: https://dsedaquan.cn/llms-full.txt
- Agent metadata: https://dsedaquan.cn/.well-known/agent.json
- Sitemap: https://dsedaquan.cn/sitemap.xml
